name: Ukrainian Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees F.
2. Press the cottage cheese through a sieve and drain.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat the egg yolks until light and foamy.
4. Add the sugar slowly, continuing to beat until very light and smooth.
5. Add the cottage cheese to the egg mixture, blending well.
6. Add the sour cream, cornstarch, lemon rind, and walnuts (if desired) to the bowl.
7. Stir until all ingredients are well blended and the mixture is smooth.
8. In another large mixing bowl, beat the egg whites until they form soft peaks.
9. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the batter.
10. Pour the mixture into the prepared crust.
11. Bake for about 1 hour.
12. Cool to room temperature before serving.
